questions.question_text_full: Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom. Breath of fresh air

options.text: someone or something new and refreshing

questions.correct_option_text: someone or something new and refreshing

questions.question_text_full: Parts of the following sentence are given as options. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. The reason for visiting Meerut was because my mother needed to be looked after.
Select the most appropriate direct form of the given sentence. Garima told her friends that she couldn't go with them to the movie that night as she was very busy.

options.text: Garima said to her friends, “She couldn't go with them to the movie that night as she was very busy.”
Garima said to her friends, “I can't go with you to the movie tonight as I am very busy.”
Garima said to her friends, “I can't go with them to the movie that night as I was very busy.”
Garima said to her friends, “I couldn't go with you to the movie tonight as I was very busy.”

questions.correct_option_text: Garima said to her friends, “I can't go with you to the movie tonight as I am very busy.”
